title: Pet Food Scoops Plastic Measuring Cups Set for Dog Cat and Bird Food (Random Color)
features: Made of ABS food grade level material, safe for pets.
Includes 4 clearly marked spoons in standard measuring sizes (1 C, 1/2 C, 1/3 C, 1/4 C).
Use for measuring pet food portions (dog, cat, bird, etc.) or even ingredients while cooking or baking.
Can be used for dry or liquid measurements. Flat base allows it to lay upright.
Measuring cups can be held together or separated for easy use, cleaning and storage; Dishwasher safe.

Gift Wrapped Up These Pet Food Scoop are packed in a beautifully designed box which makes the perfect gift for friends family or yourself. NOTICE 1. Please wash the measuring cups with warm soapy water before first using in order to wash off any residue left from the manufacturing process. 2.
